listings.name: Brookdale Lodge
listings.subcategory: Historic hotel with restaurant and lounge
listings.description: Historic Santa Cruz Mountains hotel resort with newly remodeled, pet-friendly guest rooms, the on-site 1950s-style Brookdale Diner, and The River Run lounge and event space hosting live music, weddings, and parties. The landmark's storied Brook Room dining hall (with a natural creek running through it) is not currently operating as a standalone restaurant.

listings.name: Fern River Resort

listings.service_area: Felton and Santa Cruz Mountains visitors

listings.name: Henry Cowell Redwoods State Park Campground
listings.description: State park campground in the redwoods near Felton with 107 reservable sites, each with a fire ring, picnic table, and bear-proof food locker, plus flush restrooms and coin-operated hot showers. Open year-round; reserve through ReserveCalifornia at 800-444-7275.
listings.hours_text: Campground open year-round; camping about $35 per night; reservations via ReserveCalifornia (800-444-7275)
listings.service_area: Campers visiting the San Lorenzo Valley and Santa Cruz Mountains

listings.name: Mount Hermon Christian Camps & Conference Center
listings.description: Christian camps and conference center in the Santa Cruz Mountains offering overnight cabin and lodge accommodations, meals, and meeting space, primarily for retreats, conferences, and organized group getaways. Verified operating July 2026 (own site active).
listings.service_area: Retreat, conference, and camp groups

listings.name: Roaring Camp Railroads
